title: Jedi Enclaves
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Jedi Enclave}}
'''Jedi Enclaves''' were small, satellite [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] and defense facilities of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], as proxies of the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

Enclaves were spread throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] during the time of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] up until sometime before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Enclave planets==
The following is a list of planets and the enclaves which they hosted.
*[[Arkania/Legends|Arkania]]: [[Arca Jeth's praxeum|Enclave]] established by Master [[Arca Jeth]].
*[[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]: [[Jedi enclave (Bespin)|Enclave]] run by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Djinn Altis/Legends|Djinn Altis]].
*[[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]: [[Jedi enclave (Corellia)|Enclave]] run by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]].
*[[Cularin/Legends|Cularin]]: [[Jedi enclave (Cularin)|Enclave]] used as a satellite facility by the Jedi of the [[Almas Academy]].
*[[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]: [[Jedi Enclave|Enclave]] established by Master [[Vodo-Siosk Baas]].
*[[Dorin/Legends|Dorin]]: [[Jedi Enclave (Dorin)|Enclave]] established by the [[Kel Dor/Legends|Kel Dor]].<ref name="KotOR CG">''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>
*[[Genarius]]: [[Jedi Enclave (Genarius)|Enclave]]<ref name="Blown Away">{{LivingForce|Blown Away}}</ref>
*[[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]]: [[Jedi enclave (Mustafar)/Legends|Enclave]] which housed such luminaries as [[Chu-Gon Dar]].
*[[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]]: [[Jedi Praxeum (Ossus)/Legends|Enclave]] established by Master [[Ooroo/Legends|Ooroo]].
*[[Telos IV]]: [[Telosian Jedi Academy|Secret Enclave]] established by Master [[Atris]].
*[[Tython/Legends|Tython]]: [[Masters' Retreat|Enclave]] during the [[Great Galactic War]].
*[[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]: [[Lost City of the Jedi|Enclave]] established after the defeat of [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
